S.FORM: Scott Brooks 7 bulad 31 demiad, 1965 a mihca, Scott Brooks, miunduay.
S.PHON: sʦott brooks * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, sʦott brooks, miunduaj.
